## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run compile` passed
- [ ] `npm test` passed, or I explained why it was not run
- [ ] I verified the affected user flow manually when applicable

## Documentation

- [ ] I updated README, ARCHITECTURE, INDEXING_PROCESS, or other docs when behavior/config changed
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the affected logic

## Legal

- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution
- [ ] My contribution is licensed under `GPL-3.0-or-later`
- [ ] I signed my commits with DCO attestation (`git commit -s`) when possible

## Notes

Add any reviewer context, migration notes, or follow-up work here.
